queries.question: What money market fund customers are from February and what bond fund customers are from the same time?
queries.sql:
SELECT Customers.Name 
FROM InvestmentPortfolios JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = InvestmentPortfolios.CustomerID
WHERE (InvestmentPortfolios.OpenEndFunds = "Money Market Fund" OR InvestmentPortfolios.OpenEndFunds = "Bond Fund") AND InvestmentPortfolios.Month = "February"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?investmentportfolios a :InvestmentPortfolios .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?investmentportfolios p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?customers p:name ?name .
  ?investmentportfolios p:OpenEndFunds ?openendfunds_w .
  ?investmentportfolios p:OpenEndFunds ?openendfunds_w2 .
  ?investmentportfolios p:Month ?month_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?openendfunds_w) = "Money Market Fund" || STR(?openendfunds_w2) = "Bond Fund")) && STR(?month_w) = "February"))
}

queries.question: List all money market fund customers and also list bond fund customers from February.
queries.sql:
SELECT Customers.Name 
FROM InvestmentPortfolios JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = InvestmentPortfolios.CustomerID
WHERE InvestmentPortfolios.OpenEndFunds = "Money Market Fund" OR InvestmentPortfolios.OpenEndFunds = "Bond Fund" AND InvestmentPortfolios.Month = "February"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?investmentportfolios a :InvestmentPortfolios .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?investmentportfolios p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?customers p:name ?name .
  ?investmentportfolios p:OpenEndFunds ?openendfunds_w .
  ?investmentportfolios p:OpenEndFunds ?openendfunds_w2 .
  ?investmentportfolios p:Month ?month_w .
  FILTER((STR(?openendfunds_w) = "Money Market Fund" || (STR(?openendfunds_w2) = "Bond Fund" && STR(?month_w) = "February")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show money market customers and bond fund customers from February.
